heading: Omitted
label: 84–3, 84–4 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection 84–3, which related to compensation of Deputy Sergeant at Arms (charge of pairs), was based on House Resolution No. 138, , which was enacted into permanent law by , , . See section 291 et seq. of this title.Feb. 2, 1961Aug. 10, 1961Pub. L. 87–130, § 10375 Stat. 334Section 84–4, which related to compensation of a clerk-messenger in office of Parliamentarian, was based on House Resolution No. 603, , which was enacted into permanent law by , , , and was omitted because a lump-sum appropriation is now made for the Office of Parliamentarian.Apr. 16, 1962Dec. 30, 1963Pub.
